title: Mario Kart Wii recompiled for PC using AI, with 4K potential and uncapped frame rates 'first static recompilation of a Wii game' supports over 200 tracks thanks to Retro Rewind compatibility
summary: Mario Kart Wii has been recompiled for PC with AI, offering 4K potential and uncapped frame rates. This marks the 'first static recompilation of a Wii game.' The recompiled game supports over 200 tracks thanks to Retro Rewind compatibility.
insight: Revolutionizing retro gaming with AI-driven console game recompilations.

title: Robot vacuum flaw lets one stolen certificate run root commands on other Shark robovacs in the same AWS region unpatched flaw exposes live camera feeds, stored home maps, and Wi-Fi credentials
summary: A flaw in Shark's robot vacuum allows a stolen certificate to run root commands on other devices in the same AWS region, exposing live camera feeds, stored home maps, and Wi-Fi credentials.
insight: Over-permissive AWS IoT policy enables unauthorized access to sensitive data

title: Linus Torvalds rebukes anti-AI stances in the Linux kernel code review process, says 'Linux is not one of those anti-AI projects' creator embraces AI as just a tool and 'clearly a useful one'
summary: Linus Torvalds, Linux creator, openly accepts AI-assisted tooling in kernel development.
insight: Linux development now incorporates AI as a helpful development tool.

title: Neural atom quantum computing roadmap how laser-cooled trapped atoms could pave the path beyond physical qubit counts
summary: Neural Atom Quantum Computing uses laser-cooled trapped atoms for scalable qubits. This technology enables software-defined configurable arrays and allows qubits to be moved mid-computation. Three leading companies, QuEra, Atom Computing, and Pasqal, are driving innovation in this field.
insight: Scalable qubits unlock unprecedented computational power and control.

title: AMD Ryzen 7 7700X3D is exclusive to Newegg in North America $329 CPU won't be available at other vendors until at least Q4
summary: The Ryzen 7 7700X3D is a $329 gaming CPU exclusive to Newegg in North America until at least Q4 2026. It's a top performer in gaming, but less versatile for professional tasks.
insight: Exclusivity to Newegg limits Ryzen 7 7700X3D's availability and options.

title: Tower Semiconductor revives shuttered Panasonic-era fab in $3 billion Japan photonics expansion METI-backed plan targets $3.6 billion revenue by 2028
summary: Tower Semiconductor is reviving a shuttered fab in Japan as part of a $3 billion expansion to increase production of silicon photonics, silicon germanium, and advanced packaging operations.
insight: Significant investment in Japan to boost global photonics manufacturing capacity

title: Lenovo announces world's first laptop with inkjet-printed OLED the Legion R9000P is equipped with a 240 Hz IJP panel from TCL CSOT
summary: Lenovo's Legion R9000P features a 240 Hz IJP OLED display from TCL CSOT, offering high refresh rate and color accuracy at a lower cost.
insight: Inexpensive OLED display technology brings high-end visuals to budget-conscious laptops

title: Nvidia and Japan unveil world's first national AI infrastructure Noetra consortium to build a 140MW Rubin AI factory with 27,500 GPUs
summary: Nvidia and Noetra Corp. partner to build a 140MW AI factory in Japan, featuring 27,500 Rubin GPUs and 13,750 Vera CPUs.
insight: Massive AI infrastructure boosts Japan's AI capabilities and competitiveness globally.

title: AMD Ryzen 7 7700X3D review: A slower 7800X3D, but not necessarily a cheaper one
summary: The AMD Ryzen 7 7700X3D has lower boost clock speeds than the 7800X3D, but it doesn't offer the same value as previous versions of this segmentation, making it a questionable choice.
insight: Lower specs don't necessarily translate to lower purchase prices.

title: Elon Musk spent estimated $1 billion on an energy company to power xAI, filings reveal APR Energy owns a fleet of trailer-mounted gas and diesel turbines capable of generating more than 1 gigawatt
summary: Elon Musk acquired APR Energy for an estimated $1 billion. APR Energy provides mobile turbine generators. The purchase was not publicly announced.
insight: Musk expands energy capabilities to power AI technologies significantly

title: TSMC commits another $100 billion to Arizona for at least four more 2nm fabs 2026 capex could hit $64 billion following another record quarterly earnings
summary: TSMC commits $100 billion to Arizona for additional chipmaking plants and facilities.
insight: Boosts US semiconductor industry and global tech supply chain resilience.

title: Asus ROG Xreal R1 Review: Gaming-focused AR glasses deliver 240 Hz performance and RGB style
summary: Asus ROG Xreal R1 AR glasses deliver high performance and style, featuring a 240 Hz refresh rate and a breakout box for connection to PCs or consoles.
insight: Enhanced gaming experience through high refresh rates and connectivity options

title: Prusa Research Founder Edition INDX launches limited 1,000-unit run of revolutionary toolchanger mod now shipping
summary: A limited run of 1,000 Prusa CORE One INDX Founder Editions has shipped, offering early access to Bondtech's toolchanger mod. This special edition is designed for early adopters and Prusa enthusiasts. The toolchanger mod is a revolutionary innovation in 3D printing technology.
insight: Early adopters get exclusive access to game-changing toolchanger mod

title: OpenAI's first hardware device is an RGB macropod 'Codex Micro' features 13 low-profile keys and a joystick for controlling AI coding agents
summary: OpenAI's Codex Micro is a customizable RGB macropad for AI coding agents, offering a range of customizable inputs and RGB feedback.
insight: Streamlining AI coding experience with intuitive, customizable interfaces.

title: Espressif releases SDK for Aliro smart door locks based on ESP32-C or ESP32-H SoCs
summary: Espressif Systems has released an SDK for Aliro smart door locks, based on ESP32-C and ESP32-H SoCs, supporting features like NFC tap-to-unlock and access control. The solution aims to reduce fragmentation and facilitate compatibility with popular wallets. Espressif's ESP-Aliro SDK currently only supports Aliro NFC for tap-to-unlock applications.
insight: Reducing smart lock fragmentation for seamless wallet compatibility

title: reCamera Pro Open AI Camera supports computer vision, LLM, VLM, STT, and TTS workloads
summary: Seeed Studio's reCamera Pro is an AI camera with on-device AI capabilities, supporting computer vision, LLMs, VLMs, STT, and TTS workloads, with a Rockchip RV1126B SoC and 3 TOPS NPU.
insight: Empowering AI applications at the edge with on-device processing capabilities.

title: Olimex PICO-EVB automation board adds high-voltage terminals to Raspberry Pi Pico family
summary: The Olimex PICO-EVB board is designed for high-voltage automation with Raspberry Pi Pico family, featuring multiple high-voltage inputs and relays.
insight: Enables safe high-voltage automation using Raspberry Pi Pico microcontrollers.

title: New York school deploys AI teaching robot from company linked to sex bots
summary: A New York school is deploying an AI teaching robot named Sally from Realbotix, linked to sex bots, to provide students with an AI-powered learning assistant.
insight: Blurred lines between AI learning tools and adult entertainment raise concerns.

title: AMD Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary Edition Review
summary: AMD's Ryzen 7 5800X3D offers modern gaming performance at an affordable price. For AM4 owners, it's a viable option despite being four years old. This may be the smartest path to modern gaming performance today.
insight: Cost-effective gaming upgrade option for AM4 owners with DDR4.

title: The PS3 emulator that shouldn't exist can now play 75% of the console's game library
summary: RPCS3, a PS3 emulator, has reached 75% compatibility with PS3 games on PC.
insight: Massive gaming library now accessible on PC through emulation technology.

title: OpenAI's first hardware product is a $230 mini keypad for AI coding
summary: OpenAI has unveiled its first hardware product, a mini keypad priced at $230, designed for AI coding.
insight: AI accessibility expands to developers with affordable hardware solution.

title: Microsoft's latest Patch Tuesday fixes 570 security bugs, but some Dell PCs will have to wait
summary: Microsoft's July 2024 Patch Tuesday fixes 570 Windows security bugs, including three zero-day flaws.
insight: Massive security updates mitigate critical vulnerabilities exploited by cybercriminals.

title: TSMC plans include at least four more 2nm fabs in $100 billion Arizona expansion
summary: TSMC plans to expand in Arizona with at least four 2nm fabs, part of a $100 billion investment. This comes as the company reports a record quarterly profit and increases its 2026 capital expenditure forecast to up to $64 billion.
insight: Massive investment in US chip production boosts Taiwan Semiconductor's global presence.

title: Ryzen 7 7700X3D delivers the gaming performance, but not the value
summary: AMD's Ryzen 7 7700X3D offers competitive gaming performance but struggles with value.
insight: Launch price makes it hard to recommend over other options.

title: This PC gamer turned old SSDs into gorgeous physical cartridges for Steam games
summary: A PC gamer turned old SSDs into custom physical cartridges for Steam games, showcasing a creative way to experience digital gaming in a physical format.
insight: Blending digital convenience with nostalgic physical gaming experiences.

title: To fund Apple's first computer, Steve Wozniak and Steve Jobs sold...
summary: Steve Wozniak and Steve Jobs sold the Apple-1 to raise funds for Apple's first computer. The Apple-1 was designed and hand-built by Wozniak, and Jobs helped with sales and marketing. This led to the development of the Apple II, one of the first highly successful mass-produced personal computers.
insight: Funding Apple-1 led to the creation of the Apple II computer.

title: Netflix celebrates 10 years of Stranger Thing with a VHS-quality version of the first season
summary: Netflix celebrates 10 years of Stranger Things with a VHS-quality release. The first season, launched on July 15, 2016, was a groundbreaking hit. This nostalgic release honors the series' nostalgic roots.
insight: Nostalgia-driven marketing can breathe new life into iconic franchises.

title: Woman discovers a hidden AI camera in her rental car recording her and warning about unsafe driving
summary: A woman discovered a hidden AI camera in her rental Audi, recording her and providing driver safety warnings.
insight: Privacy invasion concerns arise from integrated AI-powered dashboard cameras.

title: This retro-style home phone lets kids call friends without apps, browsers, or social media
summary: Pinwheel has launched the Pinwheel Home, a retro-style home phone for kids, allowing them to call friends without needing apps, browsers, or social media.
insight: Promotes safe, app-free communication for children in the digital age.

title: Steam Machine benchmarks show SteamOS and Windows 11 within a few frames of each other in most games
summary: A benchmark by ETA Prime shows SteamOS and Windows 11 performing similarly in most games, with SteamOS often falling just a few frames behind. However, a synthetic benchmark gave Windows a significant advantage. The results suggest that SteamOS is a viable alternative to Windows for gaming purposes.
insight: SteamOS is a viable gaming alternative to Windows for many users.

title: George Lucas says rejecting AI is like choosing the horse and buggy over cars
summary: George Lucas compares rejecting AI to choosing outdated technology, like horse and buggy over cars, suggesting AI's potential to revolutionize industries and improve lives.
insight: Embracing AI is crucial for progress and future innovation.

title: Stripe and Advent offer more than $53 billion to buy PayPal and create a payments giant
summary: Stripe and Advent offer over $53 billion to acquire PayPal, preserving its unity. The companies plan to share ownership of PayPal evenly. This unusual structure aims to maintain PayPal's core operations.
insight: Merging PayPal with Stripe creates a dominant payments infrastructure giant.
